name: The Genome Project
tagline: Trance Kuja + City on Fire (x3 dmg) — 1-2 casts kill the table
idea: Kuja builds an army of 0/1 Wizard tokens that ping each opponent for 1 whenever you cast a noncreature spell.

briefKills.line: Trance Kuja + City on Fire (×3 all dmg) and/or Harmonic Prodigy / Roaming Throne → 12–16+ damage per opponent per spell → one or two casts kill the table
Trance Kuja + 4 Wizard tokens (Birgi / Storm-Kiln refund the mana) → 8 dmg per opponent per noncreature cast → ~5 cheap casts

openings: Weakest axis — Durability (3/5): the judges' soft spot.
Tables (all three) never-close 1% of the time.

clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T7; the full table around T8.

gamePlan: Kuja builds an army of 0/1 Wizard tokens that ping each opponent for 1 whenever you cast a noncreature spell. The commander produces one token per end step automatically. Once you control four Wizards (including Kuja), he transforms into Trance Kuja, doubling all Wizard damage. The deck then chains cheap noncreature spells — draw, rituals, cantrips — to deal escalating burn damage to the entire table simultaneously.
winLine: Trance Kuja + City on Fire (x3 dmg) — 1-2 casts kill the table

finishers.name: Wizard Ping Storm
finishers.note: Trance Kuja + 4 Wizard tokens = 8 damage per opponent per noncreature spell.

finishers.name: Multiplier Stack
finishers.note: Trance Kuja + Harmonic Prodigy (or Roaming Throne) + 3–4 Wizard tokens = 12–16 damage per spell per opponent.

finishers.name: Bonus Round / Mizzix's Mastery / Underworld Breach Graveyard Storm
finishers.note: Bonus Round doubles every instant and sorcery for the rest of the turn — **but its copies are NOT cast** (oracle ruling: the copy "is created on the stack, so it's not 'cast'"), so **copies do not trigger Wizard pings**.

finishers.name: Aetherflux Reservoir
finishers.note: Chain spells to gain escalating life (1st spell = 1 life, 2nd = 2, etc.).

finishers.name: Exsanguinate
finishers.note: After generating large mana via Mana Geyser (multiplayer = massive output), Neheb (post-combat mana from ping damage), or Jeska's Will, fire a lethal Exsanguinate at the table.

rulings.name: Kuja is a Wizard
rulings.note: he counts toward the 4 to flip. So 3 tokens + Kuja = flip.
Token pings trigger on cast and resolve before the spell — the damage happens even if the spell is countered.
Trance Kuja's doubling is a replacement effect: doubles all Wizard damage, combat included. It multiplies with City on Fire (×3) and with trigger-doublers.

rulings.name: Harmonic Prodigy / Roaming Throne
rulings.note: add an extra ping trigger; Trance doubles the damage. Different layers — they stack multiplicatively.

rulings.name: Black Mage's Rod
rulings.note: makes a 1/1 Hero token and auto-equips. The equipped creature becomes a Wizard and gains the ping — the token doesn't count as a Wizard until it's equipped.

rulings.name: Black Waltz No. 3 pings for 2, not 1
rulings.note: your highest single pinger. Protect it.

rulings.name: Stormsplitter
rulings.note: tokens are Wizards (count toward the flip) but do not ping — combat damage only.

rulings.name: Black Market Connections → "Hire a Mercenary"
rulings.note: = a 3/2 changeling = counts as a Wizard. Use it when you're one short of flipping.

1 Kuja, Genome Sorcerer

mull.strategy: Looking for: 3–4 lands + early mana (rock or ritual) so Kuja lands on turn 4, plus at least one card-draw or Wizard-maker. "Has a cheap play" is not a keep: ship hands whose only early action is equipment or utility with no route to Kuja and no draw — the engine starts at the commander, and nothing in the deck replaces him.

killTree.title: The Genome Project — Kuja, Genome Sorcerer
killTree.root:
Kuja resolved — Wizard tokens ping EVERY opponent on each noncreature cast
transforms to Trance Kuja (×2 ALL Wizard damage) at 4 Wizards
killTree.stall:
build Wizards toward the 4-count transform & stock the yard —
pings need CASTS (no passive drain), so dig for a multiplier + a cheap chain
killTree.caption: cheapest line first · fall to the next

lines.need:
Trance Kuja + City on Fire (×3 all dmg)
and/or Harmonic Prodigy / Roaming Throne
lines.kill: 12–16+ damage per opponent per spell → one or two casts kill the table

lines.need:
Trance Kuja + 4 Wizard tokens
(Birgi / Storm-Kiln refund the mana)
lines.kill: 8 dmg per opponent per noncreature cast → ~5 cheap casts

lines.need:
stocked graveyard + Mizzix's Mastery
(Dawn Warriors' Legacy) or Underworld Breach
lines.kill: recast every i/s from the yard — each a REAL cast = full pings

lines.need:
mana flood (Mana Geyser / Neheb / Jeska's Will)
or 50 life via Aetherflux Reservoir

Trance Kuja + a Wizard board
(Trance doubles Wizard power) (fallback)
